channel.title: Daily Feed (Updated 9 AM BD)
channel.description: Daily Feed (Updated 9 AM BD) generated by script

item.title: Congo Pushes for Global Rules to Manage Mineral Exploitation
item.description: For one month, the Democratic Republic of the Congo holds the rotating presidency of the United Nations Security Council, and the country plans to use July to lay the groundwork for a Council resolution that could protect countries from exploitation of their own resources by armed groups. Eastern Congo’s soil holds what is described as ... Read more

item.title: As deadly as war and as powerful as governments, global organized crime remains in the shadows
item.description: When people think of the world’s deadliest threats, armed conflicts usually come to mind first. Yet every year, organized crime quietly claims a comparable number of lives.
